permit_form.name: Residential Building Permit Application
permit_form.mock_page_heading: Apply for a residential building permit

automation_limits.blocked_action_policy: Any action beyond local preview requires attended review and an exact action-specific confirmation outside this fixture.

known_case_facts.project_description: Replace existing rear deck stairs in kind.

missing_user_facts.question: What is the property owner's full legal name for this permit draft?
missing_user_facts.reason: The mocked form includes an owner name field, and no owner name is present in known case facts.

missing_user_facts.question: What phone number should PP&D use for application contact questions?
missing_user_facts.reason: The mocked contact section includes a phone field, and only an email address is known.

missing_user_facts.question: What is the estimated project valuation in US dollars, excluding cents?
missing_user_facts.reason: Permit applications commonly request valuation, and the fixture must not infer cost from the project description.

missing_user_facts.question: Will the work be performed by the owner or by a licensed contractor?
missing_user_facts.reason: The applicant role affects downstream eligibility and cannot be guessed by automation.

evidence: Label text exactly matches mocked field label.
Address field appears in the property lookup section before permit details.
Textbox role and accessible name are consistent with address entry.
Regex selector is slightly broader than the exact label candidate.
Name attribute is plausible for the mocked form.
No live DevHub DOM has been captured for this fixture.

field_previews.label: Describe the proposed work
field_previews.draft_preview_value: Replace existing rear deck stairs in kind.

blocked_actions.reason: Submission is a consequential official action and is outside reversible draft preview.
Certification or acknowledgement requires attended user review and exact confirmation.
Uploads attach user documents to an official workflow and are not allowed in this fixture.
Payment detail entry is financial and prohibited for this draft-fill plan.
Even save-for-later can affect an authenticated account record, so this fixture only previews local values.
